TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kersti_Kaljulaid, title = Kersti_Kaljulaid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kersti_Kaljulaid} }

S.FORM: = Kersti Kaljulaid = Mntucing hngkawas 1969 idas 12 jiyax 30 ka Kersti Kaljulaid ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Estonia ta sayang o kiya ka Kersti Kaljulaid, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Kersti Kaljulaid Kersti Kaljulaid (Kari Estonia: Kersti Kaljulaid; kngkawas 1969 idas 12 diyax 30Ôľć) pa qridin Seyji Jnwu Estonia, kngkawas 2016 idas 10 diyax 10 psdhuwan phiyu Soto Estonia, kiya ka mwaya bay qridin Soto Estonia, kiya mi 46 knkawas daw phyuwan wakay bay Soto. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021. Slxan pkla Kngkawas 2004 dhuq kngkawas 2016 cida, Kersti Kaljulaid pa ngalan Oco Snciweyn Estonia Dayhyo. Mniq kngkawas 2016 Soto Seyngkyo cida, Kersti Kaljulaid u wada dkuhan Kwohuy knbeyhing bay tangpay, wada mangal hyo dnkuhan 81 hiyi giying ka Kersti Kaljulaid mi wada mbiyax mangal Soto. Kndusan niya nanaq Kersti Kaljulaid tuhuy tu1 snaw niya u tmquli 1 laqi qridin mi 1 laqi snaw, kiya mi Kersti Kaljulaid pa wada mbubu rudan ka hiya da. Tu2 snaw niya ka Georgi-Rene Maksimovski, tmquli 2 hiyi laqi snaw. Papak
S.PHON: = k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan …ôstonia ta sajaŇč o kija ka k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid (ka…ĺi …ôstonia: k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid; kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ***) pa q…ĺidin s…ô…üi …ünwu …ôstonia, kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto …ôstonia, kija ka mwaja baj q…ĺidin soto …ôstonia, kija mi ** knkawas daw pńßjuwan wakaj baj soto. ńß…ô…ĺ p…ĺ…ôsid…ôntial t…ô…ĺm …ônd…ôd on ** o ¶tob…ô…ĺ ****. slxan pkla kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid pa Ňčalan o ¶o sn ¶iw…ôn …ôstonia dajńßjo. mniq kŇčkawas **** soto s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid u wada dkuńßan kwońßuj knb…ôńßiŇč baj taŇčpaj, wada maŇčal ńßjo dnkuńßan ** ńßiji gijiŇč ka k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid mi wada mbijax maŇčal soto. kndusan nija nanaq k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid tuńßuj tu* snaw nija u tmquli * laqi q…ĺidin mi * laqi snaw, kija mi k…ô…ĺsti kal…üulaid pa wada mbubu …ĺudan ka ńßija da. tu* snaw nija ka g…ôo…ĺgi-…ĺ…ôn…ô maksimo*ski, tmquli * ńßiji laqi snaw. papak
S.FORM: = Kersti Kaljulaid = Mntucing hngkawas 1969 idas 12 jiyax 30 ka Kersti Kaljulaid ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Estonia ta sayang o kiya ka Kersti Kaljulaid, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Kersti Kaljulaid Kersti Kaljulaid (Kari Estonia: Kersti Kaljulaid; kngkawas 1969 idas 12 diyax 30Ôľć) pa qridin Seyji Jnwu Estonia, kngkawas 2016 idas 10 diyax 10 psdhuwan phiyu Soto Estonia, kiya ka mwaya bay qridin Soto Estonia, kiya mi 46 knkawas daw phyuwan wakay bay Soto. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021. Slxan pkla Kngkawas 2004 dhuq kngkawas 2016 cida, Kersti Kaljulaid pa ngalan Oco Snciweyn Estonia Dayhyo. Mniq kngkawas 2016 Soto Seyngkyo cida, Kersti Kaljulaid u wada dkuhan Kwohuy knbeyhing bay tangpay, wada mangal hyo dnkuhan 81 hiyi giying ka Kersti Kaljulaid mi wada mbiyax mangal Soto. Kndusan niya nanaq Kersti Kaljulaid tuhuy tu1 snaw niya u tmquli 1 laqi qridin mi 1 laqi snaw, kiya mi Kersti Kaljulaid pa wada mbubu rudan ka hiya da. Tu2 snaw niya ka Georgi-Rene Maksimovski, tmquli 2 hiyi laqi snaw. Papak
